# theo-forge — Go SDK for Argo Workflows

> This file is context for LLMs. Read it entirely before writing any code.
> theo-forge lets you build Argo Workflow CRs programmatically in Go — type-safe, no YAML.

## Install

```bash
go get github.com/usetheodev/theo-forge@latest
```

```go
import forge "github.com/usetheodev/theo-forge"
```

Sub-packages (import only when needed):
- `github.com/usetheodev/theo-forge/expr` — expression builder
- `github.com/usetheodev/theo-forge/model` — serializable model types
- `github.com/usetheodev/theo-forge/client` — Argo REST client

---

## Core Concept

Every Argo Workflow object has a forge equivalent:

| Argo YAML | forge type | Implements |
|---|---|---|
| Workflow | `forge.Workflow` | — |
| DAG template | `forge.DAG` | `Templatable` |
| Steps template | `forge.Steps` | `Templatable` |
| Container template | `forge.Container` | `Templatable` |
| Script template | `forge.Script` | `Templatable` |
| Resource template | `forge.ResourceTemplate` | `Templatable` |
| HTTP template | `forge.HTTPTemplate` | `Templatable` |
| Suspend template | `forge.Suspend` | `Templatable` |
| ContainerSet template | `forge.ContainerSet` | `Templatable` |
| WorkflowTemplate | `forge.WorkflowTemplate` | — |
| ClusterWorkflowTemplate | `forge.ClusterWorkflowTemplate` | — |
| CronWorkflow | `forge.CronWorkflow` | — |

The pattern is always: **create struct → call `ToYAML()` or `Build()`**.

---

## Quick Start

### Minimal Workflow

```go
w := &forge.Workflow{
    GenerateName: "hello-",
    Entrypoint:   "main",
    Templates: []forge.Templatable{
        &forge.Container{
            Name:    "main",
            Image:   "alpine:3.18",
            Command: []string{"echo"},
            Args:    []string{"hello world"},
        },
    },
}
yaml, err := w.ToYAML()
```

### DAG with Dependencies

```go
dag := &forge.DAG{Name: "pipeline"}
A := &forge.Task{Name: "A", Template: "echo", Arguments: []forge.Parameter{{Name: "msg", Value: ptr("Task A")}}}
B := &forge.Task{Name: "B", Template: "echo", Arguments: []forge.Parameter{{Name: "msg", Value: ptr("Task B")}}}
C := &forge.Task{Name: "C", Template: "echo", Arguments: []forge.Parameter{{Name: "msg", Value: ptr("Task C")}}}
A.Then(B)
A.Then(C)
dag.AddTasks(A, B, C)

w := &forge.Workflow{
    GenerateName: "dag-",
    Entrypoint:   "pipeline",
    Templates: []forge.Templatable{
        &forge.Container{
            Name:    "echo",
            Image:   "alpine:3.18",
            Command: []string{"echo"},
            Args:    []string{expr.InputParam("msg")},
            Inputs:  []forge.Parameter{{Name: "msg"}},
        },
        dag,
    },
}

func ptr(s string) *string { return &s }
```

### Steps (Sequential + Parallel)

```go
steps := &forge.Steps{Name: "ci-pipeline"}
steps.AddSequentialStep(&forge.Step{Name: "build", Template: "build-tpl"})
steps.AddSequentialStep(&forge.Step{Name: "test", Template: "test-tpl"})
steps.AddParallelGroup(
    &forge.Step{Name: "deploy-us", Template: "deploy-tpl"},
    &forge.Step{Name: "deploy-eu", Template: "deploy-tpl"},
)
```

### Script Template

```go
&forge.Script{
    Name:    "compute",
    Image:   "python:3.11",
    Command: []string{"python"},
    Source:  `import json; print(json.dumps({"result": 42}))`,
    Outputs: []forge.Parameter{
        {Name: "result", ValueFrom: &forge.ValueFrom{Path: "/tmp/result"}},
    },
}
```

---

## Parameter Passing

### Output refs (type-safe)

```go
genTask := &forge.Task{Name: "gen", Template: "generate"}
useTask := &forge.Task{
    Name:     "use",
    Template: "consume",
    Arguments: []forge.Parameter{
        {Name: "data", Value: ptr(genTask.GetOutputParameter("result"))},
    },
}
genTask.Then(useTask)
```

Available on Task: `GetOutputParameter(name)`, `GetOutputResult()`, `GetOutputArtifact(name)`
Available on Step: `GetOutputParameter(name)`, `GetOutputResult()`, `GetOutputArtifact(name)`

### Expression helpers (package `expr`)

```go
import "github.com/usetheodev/theo-forge/expr"

expr.InputParam("msg")                    // "{{inputs.parameters.msg}}"
expr.TaskOutputParam("gen", "result")     // "{{tasks.gen.outputs.parameters.result}}"
expr.StepOutputParam("gen", "result")     // "{{steps.gen.outputs.parameters.result}}"
expr.TaskOutputResult("gen")              // "{{tasks.gen.outputs.result}}"
expr.WorkflowParam("env")                // "{{workflow.parameters.env}}"
expr.ParamRef("inputs.parameters.msg")   // "{{inputs.parameters.msg}}"
```

### Expression builder (Argo expression syntax `{{= }}`)

```go
e := expr.Tasks("gen").Attr("outputs").Attr("result")
e.Eq()  // "{{=tasks.gen.outputs.result}}"

expr.C(42).GT(expr.C(0)).Check(expr.C("positive"), expr.C("zero"))
// "42 > 0 ? 'positive' : 'zero'"
```

---

## Environment Variables

```go
// Plain value
forge.Env{Name: "FOO", Value: "bar"}

// From Secret
forge.SecretEnv{Name: "DB_PASS", SecretName: "db-creds", SecretKey: "password"}

// From ConfigMap
forge.ConfigMapEnv{Name: "LOG_LEVEL", ConfigMapName: "config", ConfigMapKey: "log-level"}

// From field ref (downward API)
forge.FieldEnv{Name: "POD_NAME", FieldPath: "metadata.name"}

// From resource ref
forge.ResourceEnv{Name: "CPU_LIMIT", Resource: "limits.cpu"}
```

---

## Volumes

```go
// EmptyDir
&forge.EmptyDirVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "tmp", MountPath: "/tmp"}}

// Secret
&forge.SecretVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "creds", MountPath: "/etc/creds"}, SecretName: "app-creds"}

// ConfigMap
&forge.ConfigMapVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "config", MountPath: "/etc/config"}}

// PVC (dynamic provisioning)
&forge.PVCVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "data", MountPath: "/data"}, Size: "10Gi", StorageClassName: "standard"}

// Existing PVC
&forge.ExistingVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "data", MountPath: "/data"}, ClaimName: "my-pvc"}

// HostPath
&forge.HostPathVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "docker", MountPath: "/var/run/docker.sock"}, Path: "/var/run/docker.sock"}

// NFS
&forge.NFSVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "shared", MountPath: "/shared"}, Server: "nfs.local", Path: "/exports/data"}
```

Volumes go in `Workflow.Volumes` (definition) and `Container.VolumeMounts` (mount).

---

## Artifacts

```go
// S3
&forge.S3Artifact{Artifact: forge.Artifact{Name: "data", Path: "/tmp/data"}, Bucket: "my-bucket", Key: "output.tar.gz"}

// GCS
&forge.GCSArtifact{Artifact: forge.Artifact{Name: "data", Path: "/tmp/data"}, Bucket: "my-bucket", Key: "output.tar.gz"}

// HTTP
&forge.HTTPArtifact{Artifact: forge.Artifact{Name: "file", Path: "/tmp/file"}, URL: "https://example.com/file.tar.gz"}

// Git
&forge.GitArtifact{Artifact: forge.Artifact{Name: "repo", Path: "/src"}, Repo: "https://github.com/org/repo.git", Revision: "main"}

// Raw (inline data)
&forge.RawArtifact{Artifact: forge.Artifact{Name: "config", Path: "/etc/config.yaml"}, Data: "key: value"}

// Passing artifacts between steps
&forge.Artifact{Name: "output", From: "{{steps.generate.outputs.artifacts.result}}"}
```

Use `InputArtifacts` / `OutputArtifacts` on Container, Script, DAG, Steps.
Use `ArgumentArtifacts` on Task / Step for passing between DAG tasks or step groups.

---

## Retry Strategy

```go
limit := 3
factor := 2
&forge.RetryStrategy{
    Limit:       &limit,
    RetryPolicy: forge.RetryOnFailure,
    Backoff: &forge.Backoff{
        Duration:    "5s",
        Factor:      &factor,
        MaxDuration: "1m",
    },
}
```

Set on Container, Script, or Workflow level via `RetryStrategy` field.

---

## Resources

```go
Resources: &forge.ResourceRequirements{
    Requests: forge.ResourceList{CPU: "100m", Memory: "128Mi"},
    Limits:   forge.ResourceList{CPU: "500m", Memory: "512Mi"},
},
```

---

## Template References (ClusterWorkflowTemplate / WorkflowTemplate)

```go
// Define a reusable template
wt := &forge.WorkflowTemplate{
    Name:       "shared-build",
    Namespace:  "default",
    Entrypoint: "build",
    Templates: []forge.Templatable{
        &forge.Container{Name: "build", Image: "golang:1.22", Command: []string{"go", "build", "./..."}},
    },
}
wtYAML, _ := wt.ToYAML()

// Reference it from a workflow
dag := &forge.DAG{Name: "main"}
dag.AddTask(&forge.Task{
    Name: "build",
    TemplateRef: &forge.TemplateRef{
        Name:     "shared-build",
        Template: "build",
    },
    Arguments: []forge.Parameter{{Name: "repo", Value: ptr("https://github.com/org/app.git")}},
})
```

For cluster-scope: use `ClusterWorkflowTemplate` and set `ClusterScope: true` in TemplateRef (via the model).

---

## CronWorkflow (Scheduled)

```go
cw := &forge.CronWorkflow{
    Name:              "nightly-build",
    Schedule:          "0 2 * * *",
    Timezone:          "America/Sao_Paulo",
    ConcurrencyPolicy: "Replace",
    Entrypoint:        "build",
    Templates: []forge.Templatable{
        &forge.Container{Name: "build", Image: "golang:1.22", Command: []string{"make", "build"}},
    },
}
yaml, _ := cw.ToYAML()
```

---

## Workflow Features

```go
w := &forge.Workflow{
    Name:               "full-featured",
    Entrypoint:         "main",
    ServiceAccountName: "build-sa",
    OnExit:             "cleanup",                    // exit handler template
    Parallelism:        ptr(4),                       // max concurrent pods
    NodeSelector:       map[string]string{"pool": "build"},
    TTLStrategy:        &forge.TTLStrategy{SecondsAfterCompletion: ptr(3600)},
    PodGC:              &forge.PodGC{Strategy: "OnPodSuccess"},
    ImagePullSecrets:   []string{"registry-creds"},
    Labels:             map[string]string{"app": "ci"},
    Annotations:        map[string]string{"note": "generated"},
    Volumes: []forge.VolumeBuilder{
        &forge.EmptyDirVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "workspace", MountPath: "/workspace"}},
    },
    VolumeClaimTemplates: []forge.PVCVolume{
        {BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "data", MountPath: "/data"}, Size: "5Gi"},
    },
    Templates: []forge.Templatable{...},
}
```

---

## Sidecars and Init Containers

```go
&forge.Container{
    Name:  "main",
    Image: "alpine",
    InitContainers: []forge.UserContainer{
        {Name: "init-db", Image: "postgres:16", Command: []string{"pg_isready"}},
    },
    Sidecars: []forge.UserContainer{
        {Name: "log-collector", Image: "fluentd:latest", Env: []forge.EnvBuilder{
            forge.Env{Name: "LOG_LEVEL", Value: "debug"},
        }},
    },
}
```

---

## Loops (WithItems / WithParam)

```go
// Static items
&forge.Task{
    Name:     "echo-loop",
    Template: "echo",
    Arguments: []forge.Parameter{{Name: "msg", Value: ptr("{{item}}")}},
    WithItems: []interface{}{"hello", "world", "foo"},
}

// Dynamic fan-out from previous task output
&forge.Task{
    Name:      "process",
    Template:  "process",
    Arguments: []forge.Parameter{{Name: "item", Value: ptr("{{item}}")}},
    WithParam: genTask.GetOutputResult(),
}
```

---

## Conditional Execution

```go
&forge.Step{
    Name:     "deploy-prod",
    Template: "deploy",
    When:     "{{steps.approve.outputs.result}} == yes",
}

// With expressions
&forge.Task{
    Name:     "notify",
    Template: "slack",
    When:     expr.Tasks("build").Attr("status").Equals(expr.C("Failed")).Eq(),
}
```

---

## ContainerSet (Multi-container pod)

```go
&forge.ContainerSet{
    Name: "setup-and-run",
    Containers: []forge.ContainerNode{
        {Name: "setup", Image: "alpine", Command: []string{"sh", "-c"}, Args: []string{"echo setup"}},
        {Name: "main", Image: "python:3.11", Command: []string{"python"}, Args: []string{"-c", "print('done')"}, Dependencies: []string{"setup"}},
    },
    VolumeMounts: []forge.VolumeBuilder{
        &forge.EmptyDirVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "shared", MountPath: "/shared"}},
    },
}
```

---

## Resource Template (K8s resource operations)

```go
&forge.ResourceTemplate{
    Name:   "create-configmap",
    Action: "create",
    Manifest: `apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: my-config
data:
  key: "{{inputs.parameters.value}}"`,
    Inputs:           []forge.Parameter{{Name: "value"}},
    SuccessCondition: "status.phase == Active",
}
```

---

## HTTP Template

```go
&forge.HTTPTemplate{
    Name:             "health-check",
    URL:              "https://api.example.com/health",
    Method:           "GET",
    Headers:          map[string]string{"Accept": "application/json"},
    SuccessCondition: "response.statusCode == 200",
    Timeout:          "30s",
}
```

---

## Suspend Template

```go
// Manual approval gate (waits for user to resume)
&forge.Suspend{Name: "approve"}

// Timed delay
&forge.Suspend{Name: "wait", Duration: "5m"}
```

---

## Global Configuration

```go
cfg := forge.GetGlobalConfig()
cfg.SetImage("python:3.11")              // default image for scripts
cfg.SetNamespace("argo")                 // default namespace

// Hooks — transform every template before build
cfg.RegisterTemplateHook(func(tpl *model.TemplateModel) {
    if tpl.Container != nil && tpl.Container.Resources == nil {
        tpl.Container.Resources = &forge.ResourceRequirements{
            Requests: forge.ResourceList{CPU: "50m", Memory: "64Mi"},
        }
    }
})

// Hooks — transform every workflow before build
cfg.RegisterWorkflowHook(func(wf *model.WorkflowModel) {
    if wf.Metadata.Labels == nil {
        wf.Metadata.Labels = map[string]string{}
    }
    wf.Metadata.Labels["managed-by"] = "forge"
})

defer cfg.Reset() // restore defaults
```

---

## Serialization

```go
// To YAML string
yaml, err := w.ToYAML()

// To JSON string
jsonStr, err := w.ToJSON()

// To unstructured map (for K8s dynamic client)
dict, err := w.ToDict()

// To file
path, err := w.ToFile("/output", "my-workflow")

// From YAML
model, err := forge.FromYAML(yamlStr)

// From JSON
model, err := forge.FromJSON(jsonStr)

// From file
model, err := forge.FromFile("/path/to/workflow.yaml")
```

---

## REST Client (Argo Workflows API)

```go
import "github.com/usetheodev/theo-forge/client"

svc := client.NewWorkflowsService("https://argo.example.com", "Bearer token", "default")

// Submit workflow
result, err := svc.CreateWorkflow(ctx, workflow)

// List workflows
workflows, err := svc.ListWorkflows(ctx, "default")

// Get workflow
wf, err := svc.GetWorkflow(ctx, "my-workflow", "default")

// Delete workflow
err := svc.DeleteWorkflow(ctx, "my-workflow", "default")

// Lint (dry-run validation)
validated, err := svc.LintWorkflow(ctx, workflow)

// Server info
info, err := svc.GetInfo(ctx)
version, err := svc.GetVersion(ctx)
```

---

## Migration: map[string]interface{} → forge

If the codebase builds Argo Workflows using raw maps, here is the conversion pattern:

### Before (raw maps)
```go
workflow := map[string]interface{}{
    "apiVersion": "argoproj.io/v1alpha1",
    "kind":       "Workflow",
    "metadata": map[string]interface{}{
        "generateName": "build-",
        "labels": map[string]interface{}{
            "app": "ci",
        },
    },
    "spec": map[string]interface{}{
        "entrypoint": "main",
        "templates": []interface{}{
            map[string]interface{}{
                "name": "main",
                "container": map[string]interface{}{
                    "image":   "alpine",
                    "command": []interface{}{"echo"},
                    "args":    []interface{}{"hello"},
                },
            },
        },
    },
}
```

### After (forge)
```go
w := &forge.Workflow{
    GenerateName: "build-",
    Entrypoint:   "main",
    Labels:       map[string]string{"app": "ci"},
    Templates: []forge.Templatable{
        &forge.Container{
            Name:    "main",
            Image:   "alpine",
            Command: []string{"echo"},
            Args:    []string{"hello"},
        },
    },
}
dict, _ := w.ToDict() // returns map[string]interface{} for K8s dynamic client
```

### Migration rules

1. **Top-level fields** → Workflow struct fields (GenerateName, Entrypoint, Labels, etc.)
2. **Templates array** → `[]forge.Templatable` with concrete types (Container, Script, DAG, Steps)
3. **DAG tasks** → `forge.Task` structs added via `dag.AddTask()`
4. **Steps groups** → `steps.AddSequentialStep()` and `steps.AddParallelGroup()`
5. **CWT references** → `Task.TemplateRef` with `&forge.TemplateRef{Name: "cwt-name", Template: "tpl-name"}`
6. **Inline templates** → `Task.Template` referencing a named template in the same workflow
7. **Parameters** → `forge.Parameter{Name: "x", Value: ptr("v")}`
8. **Volume claims** → `Workflow.VolumeClaimTemplates` with `forge.PVCVolume`
9. **retryStrategy map** → `forge.RetryStrategy{Limit: ptr(3), ...}`
10. **Resources map** → `forge.ResourceRequirements{Requests: forge.ResourceList{CPU: "100m", Memory: "128Mi"}, ...}`

### For K8s dynamic client submission

```go
w := &forge.Workflow{...}
dict, err := w.ToDict()
if err != nil {
    return err
}
obj := &unstructured.Unstructured{Object: dict}
result, err := dynamicClient.Resource(workflowGVR).Namespace(ns).Create(ctx, obj, metav1.CreateOptions{})
```

---

## Complete Real-World Example: CI/CD Pipeline

```go
package main

import (
    "fmt"
    forge "github.com/usetheodev/theo-forge"
    "github.com/usetheodev/theo-forge/expr"
)

func ptr(s string) *string { return &s }
func ptrInt(i int) *int    { return &i }

func main() {
    // Reusable templates
    cloneRepo := &forge.Container{
        Name:    "clone",
        Image:   "alpine/git:latest",
        Command: []string{"sh", "-c"},
        Args:    []string{fmt.Sprintf("git clone %s /workspace && cd /workspace && git checkout %s", expr.InputParam("repo"), expr.InputParam("sha"))},
        Inputs:  []forge.Parameter{{Name: "repo"}, {Name: "sha"}},
        VolumeMounts: []forge.VolumeBuilder{
            &forge.EmptyDirVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "workspace", MountPath: "/workspace"}},
        },
    }

    buildApp := &forge.Container{
        Name:    "build",
        Image:   "golang:1.22-alpine",
        Command: []string{"sh", "-c"},
        Args:    []string{"cd /workspace && go build -o /workspace/bin/app ./..."},
        Resources: &forge.ResourceRequirements{
            Requests: forge.ResourceList{CPU: "500m", Memory: "512Mi"},
            Limits:   forge.ResourceList{CPU: "2000m", Memory: "2Gi"},
        },
        VolumeMounts: []forge.VolumeBuilder{
            &forge.EmptyDirVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "workspace", MountPath: "/workspace"}},
        },
    }

    runTests := &forge.Script{
        Name:    "test",
        Image:   "golang:1.22-alpine",
        Command: []string{"sh", "-c"},
        Source:  "cd /workspace && go test -race -count=1 ./...",
        VolumeMounts: []forge.VolumeBuilder{
            &forge.EmptyDirVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "workspace", MountPath: "/workspace"}},
        },
    }

    // DAG pipeline
    dag := &forge.DAG{Name: "ci-pipeline"}
    clone := &forge.Task{
        Name: "clone", Template: "clone",
        Arguments: []forge.Parameter{
            {Name: "repo", Value: ptr("https://github.com/org/app.git")},
            {Name: "sha", Value: ptr("abc123")},
        },
    }
    build := &forge.Task{Name: "build", Template: "build"}
    test := &forge.Task{Name: "test", Template: "test"}

    clone.Then(build)
    clone.Then(test)
    _ = dag.AddTasks(clone, build, test)

    // Workflow
    limit := 2
    w := &forge.Workflow{
        GenerateName:       "ci-",
        Entrypoint:         "ci-pipeline",
        ServiceAccountName: "ci-sa",
        Parallelism:        ptrInt(4),
        TTLStrategy:        &forge.TTLStrategy{SecondsAfterCompletion: ptrInt(3600)},
        RetryStrategy: &forge.RetryStrategy{
            Limit:       &limit,
            RetryPolicy: forge.RetryOnFailure,
        },
        Volumes: []forge.VolumeBuilder{
            &forge.EmptyDirVolume{BaseVolume: forge.BaseVolume{Name: "workspace"}},
        },
        Templates: []forge.Templatable{cloneRepo, buildApp, runTests, dag},
    }

    yaml, err := w.ToYAML()
    if err != nil {
        panic(err)
    }
    fmt.Println(yaml)
}
```

---

## Key Types Reference

### forge.Workflow fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Name | string | Workflow name (mutually exclusive with GenerateName) |
| GenerateName | string | Name prefix (K8s generates suffix) |
| Namespace | string | K8s namespace |
| Entrypoint | string | Name of the entry template |
| Templates | []Templatable | All templates (Container, Script, DAG, Steps, etc.) |
| Arguments | []Parameter | Workflow-level parameters |
| Volumes | []VolumeBuilder | Volume definitions |
| VolumeClaimTemplates | []PVCVolume | Dynamic PVC provisioning |
| Labels | map[string]string | Metadata labels |
| Annotations | map[string]string | Metadata annotations |
| ServiceAccountName | string | K8s service account |
| Parallelism | *int | Max concurrent pods |
| OnExit | string | Exit handler template name |
| TTLStrategy | *TTLStrategy | Auto-cleanup timing |
| PodGC | *PodGC | Pod garbage collection |
| RetryStrategy | *RetryStrategy | Workflow-level retry |
| ImagePullSecrets | []string | Registry credentials |
| Hooks | map[string]LifecycleHook | Lifecycle hooks |

### forge.Container fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Name | string | Template name |
| Image | string | Docker image |
| Command | []string | Entrypoint |
| Args | []string | Arguments |
| Env | []EnvBuilder | Environment variables |
| Resources | *ResourceRequirements | CPU/memory |
| VolumeMounts | []VolumeBuilder | Volume mounts |
| Inputs | []Parameter | Input parameters |
| Outputs | []Parameter | Output parameters |
| InputArtifacts | []ArtifactBuilder | Input artifacts |
| OutputArtifacts | []ArtifactBuilder | Output artifacts |
| RetryStrategy | *RetryStrategy | Retry config |
| InitContainers | []UserContainer | Init containers |
| Sidecars | []UserContainer | Sidecar containers |

### forge.Script fields
Same as Container, plus:
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Source | string | Script source code |

### forge.Task fields (DAG)
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Name | string | Task name |
| Template | string | Template to execute |
| TemplateRef | *TemplateRef | Reference to CWT/WT |
| Arguments | []Parameter | Arguments to pass |
| ArgumentArtifacts | []ArtifactBuilder | Artifact arguments |
| Depends | string | Dependency expression |
| When | string | Conditional execution |
| WithItems | []interface{} | Static loop items |
| WithParam | string | Dynamic loop from output |
| ContinueOn | *ContinueOn | Continue on failure |

### forge.Step fields (Steps)
Same fields as Task, used in Steps context instead of DAG.

### forge.Parameter fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Name | string | Parameter name |
| Value | *string | Literal value |
| Default | *string | Default value |
| Description | string | Documentation |
| Enum | []string | Allowed values |
| ValueFrom | *ValueFrom | Dynamic value source |
| GlobalName | string | Global parameter name |
